creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Xclasses is a C++ layout library for the X Window System.  All objects
(called gadgets) are font-sensitive.  That is, their sizes change with the
size of the font and the size of the window.

All gadgets have the same base class (class gadget) so they are all used
the same.  Gadgets are put together in groups (class group also bases on
gadget) which manage the correct size of all gadgets (and/or groups)
inside.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/xclasses.shar
How-To-Repeat:
